---
title: "The G.I. Bill and Vocational Training"
subtitle: "Job Market Paper"
description: "This paper examines how the World War II and Korean War G.I. Bills affected vocational education and long-run labor-market outcomes."
date: 2026-07-01
---

## Abstract

This paper studies the effects of educational subsidies provided by the World War II and Korean War G.I. Bills on vocational-school completion.

[Download the paper](../../files/JMP_molligo_compressed.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}
